_publications._publicationTitle: Establishment of immortalized murine mesothelial cells and a novel mesothelioma cell line.

_contextSnippet: Western blot analysis (30 μg total protein/lane) showing the expression of mesothelin in the three murine mesothelioma cell lines RN5, AK7, and AB12
details: RN5 cells express mesothelin as shown by Western blot analysis
